history.title: The Sadashiv family began sustained work in Sullia
history.description: Their effort focused on creating practical support for children with physical and mental challenges in and around Sullia, Karnataka.

history.title: Families from rubber plantation communities needed closer access to therapy
history.description: Many children of rubber plantation workers lacked reliable access to specialized care, making a child-centered local school deeply necessary.

history.title: Sandeep Special School continues with dignified, child-friendly rooms for growth
history.description: The school offers a sanctuary where education, therapy, and everyday encouragement help children discover their maximum potential.

about.mission: To provide a sanctuary in Sullia where children with physical and mental challenges receive education, therapy, dignity, and daily encouragement.
about.vision: A child-friendly community where every child is treated as a gift and given the support needed to move toward a brighter future.
values: Equal opportunities for children from every background
Safe therapeutic spaces that respect dignity and pace
Local support for families who cannot easily reach specialized care
Steady encouragement that helps children enter the mainstream of society

events.name: Back-to-School Drive
events.description: A supply distribution day with live art, reading corners, and volunteer-led tutoring signups.

events.name: Health & Hope Camp
events.description: Free screenings, nutrition workshops, and family wellness sessions with local health professionals.

events.name: Festival of Giving
events.description: A fundraising evening with performances, youth exhibits, donor stories, and program showcases.
